step_1_image_prompt: A three-quarter angle floor-level shot on the warm honey-toned wood floor of a premium pilates studio. A sage-green reformer is softly out of focus in the background, partially filling the upper portion of the frame. Around a central empty area on the wood floor: a rolled cream-colored pilates mat tied with a thin leather strap at the upper-left of the composition, a brushed stainless steel water bottle with subtle condensation tucked toward the back-center, a small grippy black yoga towel folded at the right, and a single sprig of fresh eucalyptus laid gracefully along the lower edge of the frame. The center of the composition is intentionally empty — clean warm wood floor with generous negative space, perfectly framed by the surrounding items in a relaxed asymmetric arrangement. Soft natural daylight pours from a window behind the reformer, late-afternoon warm wash across the wood grain, gentle diffuse shadows extending forward from each object, a subtle warm golden glow on the empty floor area at center. Shot on Sony A7IV 35mm lens at floor level with a slight tilt upward. Real photograph, not AI-generated, candid moment. Real wood grain texture and visible floor scuffs, post-class quiet intentional calm mood, palette of sage green, cream, warm wood, muted eucalyptus. Minimalist editorial composition with deliberate emptiness at center.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI, persons in frame, hands in frame, body parts in frame

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits at the center of the composition on the warm wood floor, front face angled toward the camera at a three-quarter angle, the water bottle tucked behind it, the rolled mat to its left, the towel to its right, a single sprig of eucalyptus along the lower edge.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box at the empty center of the composition on the warm wood floor, oriented at a three-quarter angle with its front face tilted toward the camera so the label is clearly readable, catching the warm late-afternoon light from the window behind the reformer.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to prevent PuLID from forcing any partial face or hand artifact into the empty center where the product will be composited in Step 2.
